input_text: Request a normal change to increase the checkout database connection pool on 2026-06-17 from 02:00 UTC to 03:00 UTC. Requested by Taylor Morgan from SRE. Medium risk with rollback to restore the old value. Approval is pending.

Emergency change needed for payments routing on 2026-06-16 from 22:00 UTC to 22:30 UTC because production traffic is failing. Requested by Priya Shah from Payments. Critical risk and rollback is to revert the routing rule. Approval approved.

Standard change to rotate search service feature flags on 2026-06-18 from 01:00 UTC to 01:20 UTC. Requested by Marcus Lee from Search. Low risk with rollback by restoring previous flags. Approval approved.

Normal change to upgrade authentication callback timeout settings on 2026-06-19 from 04:00 UTC to 05:00 UTC. Requested by Jordan Kim from Identity. High risk because login flow may be affected. Approval pending.

Emergency change to disable the checkout recommendation widget on 2026-06-16 from 21:15 UTC to 21:45 UTC. Requested by Alex Rivera from Web Platform. High risk. Rollback by re-enabling the widget flag. Approval approved.

Standard change to update analytics retention policy on 2026-06-20 from 06:00 UTC to 06:30 UTC. Requested by Nina Patel from Data Platform. Low risk. Rollback by restoring previous retention settings. Approval pending.

Normal change to migrate notification queue workers on 2026-06-21 from 03:00 UTC to 04:30 UTC. Requested by Omar Chen from Messaging. Medium risk. Rollback by returning traffic to the old worker group. Approval pending.

Emergency change to block malformed API tokens at the gateway on 2026-06-16 from 23:00 UTC to 23:20 UTC. Requested by Samira Noor from Security. Critical risk. Rollback by removing the gateway rule. Approval approved.

Normal change to upgrade billing service container image on 2026-06-22 from 02:00 UTC to 03:00 UTC. Requested by Daniel Cho from Billing. Medium risk. Rollback by redeploying the previous image. Approval rejected.

Standard change to refresh CDN cache rules on 2026-06-23 from 05:00 UTC to 05:15 UTC. Requested by Emma Stone from Edge Platform. Low risk. Rollback by restoring the previous CDN rule set. Approval approved.
